title: Propose running in elevated mode when a user tries to `machine init/rm` with Hyper-V
body:
### Feature request description

When users run `podman machine init --provider hyperv` from a (non-admin) terminal we currently fail with:

```
Error: the first time Podman initializes a Hyper-V machine, it requires admin rights. Please run Podman as an administrator
```

We can instead automatically re-run the command as an administrator to avoid re-opening a new terminal.

### Suggest potential solution

As done [to automatically install WSL](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/76024e1bdb350883bbf4e17b5e3ebda3dba90916/pkg/machine/wsl/machine.go#L339), we should propose to the user to automatically re-run the command as Admin (if he belongs to the admin group). If the user accepts a [UAC prompt](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/User_Account_Control) will appear and then `podman machine init` will be re-executed as Admin.
